title: container-selinux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4:2.240.0-3]
- Delete 405.patch. This was reverted upstream. If it's needed for OCP, this
can be revisited.
- Resolves: RHEL-123749

[4:2.240.0-2]
- Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues
- Resolves: RHEL-115180
full_text:
[4:2.240.0-3]
- Delete 405.patch. This was reverted upstream. If it's needed for OCP, this
can be revisited.
- Resolves: RHEL-123749

[4:2.240.0-2]
- Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues
- Resolves: RHEL-115180
